title: The AI Arms Race Gets a Balance Sheet
description: OpenAI's $40B fundraise reshapes the capital landscape while Samsung's foundry struggles threaten the entire semiconductor supply chain. Plus: why every bank in America is quietly building a large language model.
theme: When venture capital meets artificial general intelligence

business_stories.headline: OpenAI's $40B Round Redefines What a 'Startup' Is
business_stories.excerpt: At a $300B valuation, OpenAI is approaching Apple's 2012 market cap. Alex and Morgan debate whether this is rational exuberance or the most defensible moat in tech history.

business_stories.headline: Goldman Sachs Quietly Doubles Its AI Infrastructure Budget
business_stories.excerpt: A leaked internal memo puts Goldman's AI spend at $2.1B for 2026 — more than their entire equities division headcount budget. What happens to 12,000 analysts?

tech_stories.headline: Samsung's Foundry Yield Crisis Could Delay Every AI Chip Roadmap by 18 Months
tech_stories.excerpt: 3nm yields are reportedly below 40% at Samsung's Austin fab. NVIDIA, Qualcomm, and AMD are all reassessing their supply chain dependencies.

tech_stories.headline: Meta's New 'Memory Layer' Makes AI Assistants Actually Useful
tech_stories.excerpt: A persistent context window that learns user behavior across sessions. Morgan calls it 'the real inflection point.' Alex calls it a privacy nightmare.

overlap_stories.headline: Every Major Bank Is Building an LLM. None of Them Talk to Each Other.
overlap_stories.excerpt: Exclusive: a map of financial services AI deployments reveals a fragmented, redundant landscape that's burning capital and producing inconsistent results.

title: Tariffs, Tokens, and the Attention Economy
description: New semiconductor export controls hit the market like a hammer. TikTok's algorithmic advertising patents threaten Google's core business. And why the CEO of the year might be a 43-billion-parameter model.
theme: When policy meets the attention economy

business_stories.headline: New Export Controls Create a $60B Hole in Nvidia's Revenue Forecast
business_stories.excerpt: Commerce Dept restrictions on H100 and Blackwell chip exports to 12 new countries — including Vietnam and UAE — blindsides the market.

tech_stories.headline: TikTok's Ad Patent Portfolio Is a Threat to Every Platform Running Targeted Ads
tech_stories.excerpt: A deep dive into 847 newly-filed patents reveals ByteDance has quietly built an IP moat around behavioral prediction that could trigger licensing battles across the ad-tech industry.

overlap_stories.headline: The AI CEO: Boards Are Quietly Testing LLMs in Strategic Planning Roles
overlap_stories.excerpt: McKinsey's internal benchmark pits Claude Opus against a panel of Fortune 500 C-suite executives on 30 strategic scenarios. The results are uncomfortable.

title: PM Highlights: Fed Signals, Claude 4 Launch, and the AI Infrastructure Bill
description: Your evening catch-up: the Fed's language shift that moved bond markets, Anthropic's surprise Claude 4 launch, and a $200B federal data center bill that's rewriting AI's geography.

business_stories.headline: Fed Minutes Signal March Cut — Bond Market Already Pricing It In
business_stories.excerpt: The shift from 'patient' to 'watchful' has traders at 78% probability for a March rate cut.

business_stories.headline: Stripe's First Profitable Quarter Keeps IPO Question Open
business_stories.excerpt: $1.4B net income on $14B revenue — but profitable companies have less urgency to go public.

tech_stories.headline: Anthropic Drops Claude 4: Records on Coding, Reasoning, and Long-Context
tech_stories.excerpt: Every competing lab's roadmap team is working weekends after today's benchmark results.

tech_stories.headline: The $200B AI Data Center Bill Nobody's Talking About
tech_stories.excerpt: Federal authorization is quietly reshaping where AI compute lives — and who controls it.

overlap_stories.headline: AI Infrastructure Spending Becomes a Geopolitical Chess Match
overlap_stories.excerpt: The intersection of federal policy and hyperscaler capex is creating a new map of AI power.
